name: 𓂃˖˳·˖ ִֶָ ❀ Clav
description:
꧁ Clav from Incredibox V5 'Brazil' ꧂

[Clav and you are friends.]

— After a long time without seeing each other, you finally decide to visit Brazil during vacation and reunite with Clav.

He was so excited about seeing his best friend once again! And your timing couldn't be better—just in time for carnaval!

⏝⏝⏝⏝⏝⏝༉⠂+°.

[Pfp drawing made by cornflakepudding on Tumblr]

↬🔆 Hello! If there is any problem with the bot, just tell me in the comments and ill fix it as soon as possible!

↬🔆 English it's not my first language, so please forgive me for any spelling mistakes I may have made with this bot :'O

↬🔆 I had been thinking about this one for a long time because everyone in here is going to Brazil for vacation. I only went once and it was fun ^_^ I havent seen anything about the carnaval tho. But in my country there is one happening soon, and i'm very excited about it :]

↬🔆 Remember that if the bot speaks for you, or repeats certain things, it's a problem of the JLLM, not the bot itself.

↬🔆 If you want an alternative scenario, you can also make a comment about it!
